title: UPI OC No 181 B FY 24 25 – Addendum to OC 181 A –Implementation of UPI Limits for P2P transactions
text:
NZI»

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCIUPHOC 181B/2024-25 4" September 2024

To,
All Member Banks of Unified Payments Interface (UPI)

Madam/Sir,
Subject: Addendum to O0C181A — Implementation of UPI limits for P2P transactions

Vide reference to NPCI/UPI/OC 181/2023-24 dated 16" November 2023 and NPCI/UPI//OC
181A/2024-25 dated 7" June 2024 the limit for user to receive funds in their bank account via
P2P in 24 hours was defined. With reference to the same, we will have additional limit on count
of transactions via P2P regardless of the transaction value.

No Description Remarks

P2P credit is capped at 25 successful transactions OR

cumulative Rs 4 lacs in a period of 24 hours and Toei ie Ms a
transactions < Rs 2,000 are excluded. 9 9
P2P credit will be capped at 50 successful transactions | NPCI/UPI/OC 181B/2024-25
in a period of 24 hours (New)

| Sr | Circular Reference &

1

The mentioned changes shall be applicable with immediate effect and member banks are
required to ensure the limits are implemented latest by 30° September 2024.

Yours sincerely,
SD/-

Kunal Kalawatia
Chief of Products
